message:
perf(freeze): Optimize array operations in frozen code (3.5x speedup)

Optimizations to frozen bytecode execution:
- frozen_get_length: Use JS_GetLength API directly (faster than JS_GetPropertyStr)
- frozen_array_get: Add fast path with JS_GetPropertyUint32 for positive indices
- Peephole optimization: Detect get_arg+get_length pattern, emit optimized code that skips DUP/FREE overhead
- Remove edgebox-freeze from CLI build (freeze functionality is already integrated into edgeboxc as library)

Loop benchmark improvement: 0.49ms -> 0.14ms (3.5x faster)
